module.path: manga-list*0|ul*0|li*999|(p*0|@+p*1|@,manga-list-2-cover*0|a*0|@href|_TEXT*0|[_ADD-R_]*{User-Agent*Mozilla/5.0 ##2#Linux; Android 10; HarmonyOS; SCM-W09; HMSCore 6.6.0.332##3# AppleWebKit/537.36 ##2#KHTML##1# like Gecko##3# Chrome/88.0.4324.93 HuaweiBrowser/11.1.2.332 Mobile Safari/537.36},manga-list-2-cover*0|a*0|img*0|@src|_TEXT*0||[_CUT-L_]*/static/|[_ADD-L_]*https://mwappimgs.cc/static/)
